authorization_phrase: Authorize s14-d1-cash-equity Tier-N spec DRAFT only — bound by DR10 v2.
c1_c8_phase_2_safety_contracts: inherited by-reference from phase-2 safety contract template; cash-equity adaptations: C5 corporate-action handling = splits documented + applied per split_only (NOT structurally absent like futures); C3 extended-hours NOT_APPLICABLE (daily bars); C4 boundary alignment = US equity RTH session

cost_surface_proposed_at_draft_locked_at.note: Equity cost surface is structurally lower-drag than micro-futures contract-quantization; per-share commission is tiny fraction of notional. Exact constants LOCKED at SEAL. DR9 audit confirmed clean data; cost-stress matrix (S0-S4) applies these constants × scalars at P6.5-equivalent (separate phase).

da_register.name: candidate_record_id
da_register.rationale: Fresh candidate id; orthogonal to all forbidden tracks

da_register.name: mechanic_family
da_register.rationale: Slower RSI period than s13-d1's RSI(2); cash-equity asset class

da_register.name: per_trade_risk_pct
da_register.rationale: Proven DR3 mitigation from s13-d1; standard sizing (not nano) admissible under DR10 v2 for cash equity

da_register.name: START_CASH_USD
da_register.rationale: Differentiates from s13-d1's DA4=C $200k; DR10 v2 cost_drag clears with strong margin at $100k for cash equity (~0.3-0.6% S2)

da_register.name: K4_max_drawdown_magnitude_threshold
da_register.rationale: Carried byte-equivalent from s13-d1 SEAL

da_register.name: RSI_period
da_register.rationale: Slower than s13-d1's RSI(2); narrower distribution; tighter thresholds compensate

da_register.name: cost_stress_tiers
da_register.rationale: Carried byte-equivalent from s13-d1 chain

da_register.name: RSI_long_entry_threshold
da_register.rationale: Tighter than s13-d1's < 10 because RSI(3) has narrower distribution

da_register.name: RSI_long_exit_threshold
da_register.rationale: Mean-reversion complete; tighter than s13-d1's > 50

da_register.name: RSI_short_entry_threshold
da_register.rationale: Bi-directional symmetric to long entry

da_register.name: RSI_short_exit_threshold
da_register.rationale: Mean-reversion complete; symmetric

da_register.name: ATR_period
da_register.rationale: Equity ATR convention commonly 14; operator confirms at SEAL; 20 also admissible if carrying futures-chain convention
da_register.resolution: PROPOSED 14 (equity-standard) — CONFIRM AT SEAL (s13-d1 used 20; equity convention often 14)

da_register.name: ATR_stop_multiplier_in_ATR
da_register.rationale: Carried byte-equivalent from s13-d1 SEAL

da_register.name: DR10_definition
da_register.rationale: s14+ candidate carries DR10 v2 by-reference; cash-equity cost_drag clears branch with strong margin
da_register.resolution: v2 AND-conjunction (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05); thresholds 0.50/0.05 byte-equivalent

da_register.name: DR9_data_continuity_thresholds
da_register.rationale: DR9 audit ALREADY PASSED for all 3 symbols (sealed result_seal 1c93d4294e...); thresholds immutable

da_register.name: warmup_days
da_register.rationale: RSI(3) needs ~4 bars; ATR(14) needs ~15 bars; 30-day warmup gives comfortable margin; equity-shorter than s13-d1's 220 (which covered ATR(20) + extra)
da_register.resolution: PROPOSED 30 (covers RSI(3)+ATR(14) lookback with margin) — CONFIRM AT SEAL

da_register.name: adjustment_convention
da_register.rationale: split_only confirmed feasible via Tiingo splitFactor stream; NVDA 10:1 + 4:1 + AAPL 4:1 all verified consistent; switching post-SEAL forbidden
da_register.resolution: split_only (CONFIRMED available + applied; DR9 split-event-consistency PASS all 3 symbols)

da_register.name: data_vendor
da_register.rationale: Tiingo succeeded where yfinance curl_cffi failed TLS; data captured + DR9-PASS

da_register.name: universe
da_register.rationale: Operator-revisable to cross-sector at DRAFT for stronger A7; current selection retained

da_register.name: portfolio_position_caps
da_register.rationale: Per-name independent signal generation; no pyramid
da_register.resolution: max_positions_per_name=1, max_total_positions=3, no inter-name signal coordination

diversification_metrics_load_bearing_at_.A6_concentration_index: NVDA-dominance risk (analogous to s7-D1 USO-dominance pathology)
diversification_metrics_load_bearing_at_.A7_effective_independent_bets: expected 1.5-2.0 (POTENTIAL CONCERN — all-tech basket ~0.7-0.85 pairwise correlation)
diversification_metrics_load_bearing_at_.cross_sector_revision_option: operator may revise universe to cross-sector at a fresh sibling PLAN for stronger A7

dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.binding_evaluation: (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) -> fires; CLEARS if either branch fails
dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.dr10_v2_status: CLEARS WITH STRONG MARGIN (cost_drag branch does not fire; AND-conjunction not triggered)
dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.expected_annual_turnover: ~30-60 (turnover branch fires alone; non-binding under AND)
dr10_v2_reachability_table_draft.expected_s2_cost_drag: ~0.3-0.6% (per-share commission tiny fraction of notional; well under 5%)

dr9_gate_status_carried_into_draft.data_provenance_locked: AAPL/MSFT/NVDA Tiingo split_only CSVs sha-verified against manifest; DR9 sealed

dr_precedence_chain: DR7 -> DR1 -> DR9 -> DR10 -> DR6 -> DR4 -> DR2 -> DR3 -> DR5

dr_register.DR10_v2: turnover_cost_explosion (annual_turnover>0.50 AND S2_cost_drag>0.05) byte-equivalent (DA14) -> REJECT_FAST. AND-conjunction per framework SEAL 78cd22e. Cash-equity cost_drag branch clears with strong margin (~0.3-0.6% S2 << 5%); turnover branch alone does NOT fire under AND
dr_register.DR11: NOT IN CHAIN — cash equity unlevered; no leverage cap
dr_register.DR3: zero_cost_only_survival (S0>0 AND all S1..S4<=0) -> REJECT_FAST (RSI-lineage HIGHER prior; cash-equity multi-name hypothesis-fresh)
dr_register.DR5: cost_stress_turns_edge_negative tier flip -> REJECT_FAST / INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD carveout
dr_register.DR9: data_continuity_integrity_check (per-name; thresholds 0.95/0.30/NOT_APPLICABLE_roll/5 + documented_split_event_consistency) -> INCONCLUSIVE_HOLD. STATUS: ALREADY PASSED all 3 symbols (sealed result_seal 1c93d4294e...)

framework_dr10_binding: v2 AND-conjunction (framework SEAL at commit 78cd22e); s14+ candidate carries by-reference; thresholds 0.50 turnover / 0.05 cost_drag immutable

is_oos_windows.note: Data already captured for full 2019-01-02 to 2025-12-30 window; IS/OOS split at 2023-12-29 / 2024-01-02 boundary; OOS NEVER inspected at IS phase

k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_is_status: CLEARS WITH MARGIN (180-315 trades over 5y; 9-16x floor)
k9_reachability_table_draft.k9_oos_status: CLEARS at central/high (72-126 trades); BORDERLINE at low estimate (36 < 50/y floor)
k9_reachability_table_draft.rec1_equivalent_disclosure: If observed effective IS rate < 25/y basket-summed, OOS K9 unreachability becomes structurally probable -> PARK per s10-d2/s12-d1 precedent. K9 OOS risk MODERATE.

k_gates.K10_avg_pairwise_corr: APPLICABLE (multi-name); expected 0.70-0.85 (US large-cap tech); LOAD-BEARING at SEAL
k_gates.K12_DR_fires_on_cost_stress: if any DR2/DR3/DR4/DR5 fires across S0/S2/S3/S4 cost-stress sweep at P6.5-equivalent -> FAIL_SAFETY
k_gates.K6_per_symbol_dispersion: APPLICABLE (multi-name); thresholds carried from s10-d2 chain; LOAD-BEARING at SEAL
k_gates.K7_filter_silently_introduced: if any filter/regime/correlation gate introduced post-SEAL -> FAIL_SAFETY
k_gates.K8_sealed_parent_drift: if any sealed parent seal mismatches embedded constant -> FAIL_SAFETY
